html:div.html:p: This library defines decision support logic for the IMMZ.D5.DT.Measles contraindications decision table in the Immunization CPG

html:tr.html:th: Draft Medication Request ID for Measles dose
Measles vaccination could be contraindicated. Clinical judgement required. Create a clinical note
Measles vaccination could be contraindicated. Clinical judgement required. Create a clinical note Guidance
Clinical judgement required. Create a clinical note Case 1
Clinical judgement required. Create a clinical note Case 2
Clinical judgement required. Create a clinical note
Clinical judgement required. Create a clinical note Guidance
